title: Reduction
short: The gain of electrons by a species; its oxidation number decreases.
full:
Reduction is the gain of electrons. The species that gains electrons is reduced and acts as the oxidizing agent (OIL RIG: Reduction Is Gain).

A decrease in oxidation number marks reduction. Because electrons must come from somewhere, reduction is always coupled to the oxidation of another species; balancing the electrons lost and gained is the heart of balancing redox equations and analysing electrochemical cells.
